content:
Students must construct a deceptive but logically sound misinterpretation of a text and defend it persuasively.

Mastery Streak Structure

✔ Pass a Mastery Exam? → Continue to next level.
✔ Fail a Mastery Exam? → Attempt a Redemption Path.
✔ Fail a Redemption Path? → Lose streak permanently.

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages critical thinking by forcing students to take difficult rhetorical positions.
• Reinforces that betrayal = both self-inflicted failure and the need for redemption.
• Ensures that students who fail twice are still challenged before removal.

📖 3. Choice-Based Class Sections – POV Expansion & Narrator Integration
